basic_details.job_title: DSM Degree College Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Lecturer and Peon Posts
basic_details.short_information: DSM Degree College has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of Lecturer and Peon Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Candidates with Master Degree for Lecturer, 10th Pass for Peon qualification can directly attend the interview on 17-07-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

content_sections.heading: DSM Degree College Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DSM Degree College Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DSM Degree College Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: DSM Degree College Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for DSM Degree College Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: DSM Degree College Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for DSM Degree College Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the recruitment of Lecturer and Peon posts at DSM Degree College is scheduled for 17th July 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Lecturer post?
faq.answer: For the Lecturer post, candidates must possess a Master Degree in the concerned subject with a minimum of 55% marks. This ensures a strong academic background for teaching.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification for the Peon post?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required for the Peon post is passing the 10th standard examination. This is a basic requirement for the support staff role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview in person at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for both Lecturer and Peon posts at DSM Degree College is contractual. This means the employment is for a fixed period as per the college's requirements.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the walk-in interview going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at DSM Degree College, Dhenkanal, Odisha, with the pincode 759015. Candidates should plan their travel accordingly.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of these documents, and recent passport-size photographs to the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no specific application fee has been mentioned for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for both Lecturer and Peon posts will be as per the G.B recommendations. Specific details regarding the salary will be provided during the interview process.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive by DSM Degree College is 98/26. This number should be referenced in any communication related to this vacancy.
